<!--
Thanks for contributing. Please review CONTRIBUTING.md before opening this PR.
-->

## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences. What does this change? -->

## Type of change

<!-- Check the box that applies. Multiple OK. -->

- [ ] Typo / grammar / link repair
- [ ] Doc-link additions or vendor blueprint refresh
- [ ] New cert scaffold (issue opened first to confirm scope)
- [ ] New `learn/` content (concept page, day-one, glossary)
- [ ] New `resources/` content (comparison, cheat sheet, roadmap, hands-on, etc.)
- [ ] Diagram (Mermaid inline or PNG via draw.io under `assets/diagrams/`)
- [ ] Automation / CI / scripts under `.github/`
- [ ] Other (describe in summary)

## Out-of-scope check

- [ ] No marketing / affiliate / SEO content
- [ ] No verbatim vendor exam questions
- [ ] No AI-generated notes that don't follow the repo's structured pattern

## House style

- [ ] No em dashes; only regular dashes (`-`)
- [ ] Plain English, short sentences, no body emoji (section markers OK)
- [ ] Vendor docs cited in the `**[📖 Title](URL)** - description` format
- [ ] If the page is new or significantly refreshed: `last-updated: YYYY-MM-DD` frontmatter set

## Validators

If you ran the local validators, paste the summary lines here:

- [ ] `bash .github/scripts/validate-cert-structure.sh` clean
- [ ] `bash .github/scripts/validate-frontmatter.sh` clean

## Related issue / context

<!-- Link the issue this PR closes, if any. Otherwise note the motivation. -->
